sections.paragraph:
Original: תּאוה

Transliteration: ta'ăvâh

Phonetic: tah-av-aw'

BDB Definition:

  1. desire
    1. desire, wish, longings of one's heart
      1. lust, appetite, covetousness (bad sense)
    2. thing desired, object of desire

Origin: from H183 (abbrev)

TWOT entry: 40d

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
